ActionTaken: No formal action recorded. Estero Parkway Village Manager Sarkozy introduced the topic and spoke regarding the public comment process. Kyle Coleman, Assistant to Village Manager, offered a PowerPoint presentation including information regarding the initial step taken by providing a link to a survey on the Village website that ran for 10 days; 282 responses via online form, 15 responses via email, and 1 phone call; five optional road layouts were provided, as well as 2 preferred landscape density options, along with priority options for safety, beautification/ landscaping, cost, and speed. Mr. Coleman also spoke to the takeaways of the first step; significant community input; residents seem undecided on road layout; clear landscape density preference; greater survey details needed; and two phase vs. one phase decision needed for next steps.
